name: Whitefish Baked w/ Fiddlehead Ferns
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup white wine, 2 tablespoons Dijon mustard, salt, and white pepper to taste.
2. Add 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme.
3. Place four (7-oz) whitefish fillets in a deep baking dish large enough to hold them in one layer.
4. Pour the mixture over the fish.
5. Wash and prepare 3/4 pound fiddlehead ferns and asparagus, finely diced.
6. Scatter the onions on top of the fish.
7. Preheat oven to 375°F.
8. Bake for 20 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and arrange a bed of onions and fiddleheads on a platter.
10. Swirl butter into the cooking liquid and pour over the fish.
11. Serve immediately.
